description: Part of a ketubba for an unnamed bride and David b. Moshe known as Rāmāno (ראמאנו). Dating: Late. Currency: peraḥim. Location and names of any witnesses are not preserved. Verso: the name ‘David Rāmāno’. (Information from CUDL and Goitein's index card.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
